projectDescription: A web-based pediatric developmental screening platform (AVDB) that administers standardized assessments of daily living activities for children aged 3–12, storing anonymous results and providing an admin analytics dashboard.
keyFeatures: Two-stage developmental screening: Preescolar (ages 3–6) and Escolar (ages 7–12)
Four assessment dimensions: Alimentación, Higiene Personal, Vestido, Funcionamiento Diario
Anonymous data collection with Supabase backend and Row Level Security
Admin analytics dashboard with radar charts, risk distribution, and group comparison
Excel export per individual patient or globally across all filtered records
Manual record entry for paper-based assessments
Inverted-question logic for sensory sensitivity items
Risk classification: Green (Optimal), Yellow (Monitoring), Orange (Moderate), Red (Significant Risk)
publicApiSurface: POST /onboarding — Collect child age, gender, and neurodevelopmental conditions
POST /test — Administer 4-phase questionnaire and submit answers to Supabase
GET /admin — Protected analytics dashboard (requires Supabase auth session)
Supabase table: users (id, birth_year, gender, diagnoses)
Supabase table: answers (id, user_id, test_type, total_score, phase_1-4_score, raw_answers, source)
